text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Allow me to wish you a happy birthday, Satono. I
pray your future endeavors be met with success.
Additionally...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I've prepared a congratulatory gift. You'll find it
waiting in your room later.

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text: Gasp! You really did that for me?!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Th-thank you so much! I'll... I'll treasure it
forever! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, so long as you like it, that's enough for me.
After all, it's a—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Oh! This means it's the perfect chance for me to
try breaking that jinx!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
There's one where you get nightmares if you put a
gift from someone you admire under your pillow!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
U-under your pillow?! Um, Satono, I'd have to
advise you against—

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
Eheh. ♪ I won't spare an inch of effort in trying to
break it, even if I have to do it in my dreams!
Okay, here I go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Sh-she's completely off in her own world... But I
really must get through to her somehow.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I need to tell her that my gift is a specially-made
Mejiro family birthday cake!
